ValidationRule.description: Verifies required fields are populated when Stage is Closed - No Change, Closed Lost or Closed - No Change/Lost for Core Services.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: NOT(RecordType.Name = "Patient Engagement Opportunity")&& (ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed - No Change")|| ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed Lost")|| ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed - No Change/Lost"))&& (ISNULL(CloseDate)|| ISNULL(Who_Won__c)|| ISBLANK(Other_Detail__c) || ISPICKVAL(Close_Reason__c, "")|| ISNULL(Lost_Date__c))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Required Fields: Lost Date, Close Date, Close Reason, Closed Stage Detail and Who Won.
